title: The Climate Wars: How Superpowers Are Carving Up the Earth | With Arthur Snell
content: What do melting Arctic ice, a war for farmland in Ukraine, and the panic of Gulf petro-states have in common? Arthur Snell exposes the terrifying new geography of global conflict and how humanity can adapt to survive it.
